expected_band: real hourly load; strong daily seasonality with weekday effects

engine.model: forecasting method ladder: classical numpy (seasonal-naive, SES, Holt, Holt-Winters, Theta; live-capable) + statistical (AutoARIMA, AutoETS, AutoTheta via statsforecast; offline, when installed)

provenance.citation: Trindade, A. (2015). ElectricityLoadDiagrams20112014. UCI ML Repository. DOI 10.24432/C58C86.

flags.flag: timestamps not strictly increasing (sorted on ingest)
